title: Nigerian Power Sector Investment Opportunities and Guidelines

comparative_failure_data.note: Nigeria has 6.8x Ghana's population but only 2.5x its generation capacity

hydropower_potential.mambilla_status: Identified in 1988 study, still prospective as of this document

coal_reserves.status: Most mines under federal concession, detailed exploration still needed

agencies: Federal Ministry of Water Resources (hydropower water rights)
Federal Ministry of Mines and Steel Development (coal concession)
regulatory_agencies_required.analytical_note: No single point of accountability; no published average time to financial close

key_legislation.electricity_act_key_change: States, companies and individuals empowered to generate, transmit and distribute electricity

incentives.pioneer_status_incentive: Corporate income tax holiday, 3 years initial, extendable to maximum 5 years
incentives.analytical_note: FiT base year 2016 presented in post-2023 updated document — nine-year-old tariff schedule is a material credibility problem for prospective investors

nbet_portfolio.function: Bulk trader between GenCos/IPPs and DisCos
nbet_portfolio.analytical_note: Sector requires USD 3.5bn/year in generation investment alone; NBET manages USD 2bn total contract portfolio — structural underfunding evident

transmission.analytical_note: Lack of redundancy creates instability; financing models proposed include ROT and Management Contract due to budgetary constraints

thread_continuity.fourth_generation_target_reset: 10,000 MW (2007) → 2010 Roadmap targets → 2020 interim → 30,000 MW by 2030; each reset without accounting for prior failure
thread_continuity.off_grid_gap_trajectory: Acknowledged NEPP 2001 → mapped in detail here → still unaddressed; 95% of clusters non-electrified
thread_continuity.gas_dependency_paradox: Present mix 75% gas against 77% supply shortfall; 2030 target still 55% gas with no infrastructure pathway explained
thread_continuity.liberalisation_form_vs_substance: 2023 Act enables state markets; only 3 of 36 states have passed enabling legislation
thread_continuity.investor_information_gaps: Document omits average time to financial close, percentage of PPAs reaching commercial operation, DISCO payment collection rates
